spmixqr 0.3.1
  • Get started

  • Reference manual

Effective degrees of freedom (component smoothers + gate smoother).

Source: R/spmixqr.R
compute_edf.Rd

The component trace tr[(X'WpX + P)^{-1} X'WpX] is computed sparsely when the CAR block is present (the design is a sparse Matrix), adding the CAR-smoother trace.

Usage

compute_edf(fit, Xt, Z, Pen_beta, Pen_gamma, G, des, spatial_coef)

Developed by Kailas Venkitasubramanian.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
